description: Mel Hair Braiding offers knotless braids, box braids, feed-ins, twists, loc care, and protective styling appointments.

hero.headline: Mel Hair Braiding
hero.copy: Clean parts, comfortable tension, and braid work designed to hold its shape while caring for your natural hair.

intro.heading: Styles that look polished on day one and still feel good in week four.
intro.copy: Whether you want a soft knotless set, defined feed-ins, boho length, or a careful refresh for locs, every appointment starts with a quick scalp and hair check so the style fits you.

services.name: Knotless Braids
services.description: Lightweight feed-in braids with a natural root and reduced scalp tension.

services.name: Box Braids
services.description: Classic protective styling with neat sections, secure ends, and optional beads.

services.name: Feed-In Cornrows
services.description: Sleek straight-backs, stitch parts, ponytails, and custom pattern work.

services.name: Boho Twists
services.description: Soft, movement-rich twists with curly accents for a fuller romantic finish.

services.name: Loc Care
services.description: Retwists, starter loc consults, detox care, and simple two-strand styling.

services.name: Consultation
services.description: Not sure what fits your hair, schedule, or budget? Start here.

gallery.heading: Detailed parts, smooth finish, confident wear.
gallery.primaryAlt: Stylist carefully braiding a client's hair in a salon
gallery.caption: Precision braid work in the chair.
gallery.secondaryAlt: Close view of long blonde box braids
gallery.quote: "My goal is simple: every client should leave with a style that feels secure, looks intentional, and does not punish their edges."

care.heading: A little prep keeps the install smooth.
care.copy: Please arrive with hair washed, detangled, and stretched unless your appointment includes prep. Bring inspiration photos, note any scalp sensitivity, and plan extra time for waist-length or small-part styles.
tips: Clean hair with no heavy oils or gels gives the neatest finish.
Sleep with satin and moisturize your scalp lightly between washes.
Book removal or touch-up before the style starts pulling or matting.

booking.heading: Tell us what you want in the chair.
booking.copy: Send your preferred style, date, and contact details. You will receive a confirmation with prep notes, final timing, and deposit instructions.
booking.localMessage: Thanks, {name}. Your {service} request is ready to send.

footer.copy: Protective styling, braid care, and custom looks by appointment.
footer.credit: Photos via Unsplash: Tosan Dudun and Bahare Ghadirzade.
